title: Low Durability Tint
description: Tints Every piece of Armor and Weapon/Tool to red whenever it goes below 20% Durability.
body:
**Low Durability Tint** adds a red tint to all armor or weapons/tools whenever they reach below 20% durability. The requirement for each item to tint is unique, and a chart will be put at the bottom of the description.

**An Armor hud Mod like [uku's Armor HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukus-armor-hud) is _highly_ reccomended for seeing armor durability, as it doesnt display on the armor model as to not give an unfair advantange to other players.**

# Every armor/tool at 20% durability.
![Everything](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/564e69cbb844292a53bc91f3a0d19e01104bc811.png)

| Item | Max Durability | 20% Left |
|---|---|---|
| Helmet | 363 | 73 |
| Chestplate | 528 | 106 |
| Leggings | 495 | 99 |
| Boots | 429 | 86 |
| Pickaxe | 1561 | 313 |
| Axe | 1561 | 313 |
| Shovel | 1561 | 313 |
| Hoe | 1561 | 313 |
| Sword | 1561 | 313 |
| Elytra | 432 | 87 |


(No generative A.I was used for this project except for the chart above.)
